DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Alison Yew, Esq, Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith LLP, 415-438-6644, for defendant and moving party: Market Hall Food, Sara Wilson and Tony Wilson
Brian D. Sudano, Esq., Sudano Law Firm, 925-849-4183, for plaintiff and opposing party: Obbia fortune

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARKET HALL FOODS, SARA WILSON AND TONY WILSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST. AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 2nd. cause of action (NIED). Plaintiff must plead each element of negligence with particularity, including what duty was owed and how it was breeched. Overruled as to 3rd. cause of action (IIED). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.). (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
